Title: Nanatsu no tama o soroeshi mono yo... Sâ aikotoba o ie!
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Plot: Start of the "Frieza Saga". Goku recovers in the isolation chamber, Gohan guards the dragon balls, and Vegeta rests while they all wait on Krillin's return; Dende looks for Krillin and Gohan; Frieza finishes interrogating Nail.
